category_sources: source_facts.description: Provides an easy way to use U2F-compliant authenticators with PAM
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pam-u2f; official Yubico repository is named pam-u2f
docs_sources: Official Yubico developer site is the dedicated pam-u2f documentation surface
repo_sources: Official Yubico pam-u2f repository identifies itself as the PAM module for U2F and FIDO2 and links to developers.yubico.com/pam-u2f
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Yubico documentation describe PAM authentication with U2F/FIDO2 authenticators
